zh.featured.label: 重点项目
zh.featured.title: Insighta 科研诚信审查平台
zh.featured.subtitle: AI 驱动的科研诚信审查基础设施
zh.featured.description: 检测图像复用、AIGC 生成图像，并为学术审查构建可解释的证据链。
zh.featured.videoFallback: 您的浏览器不支持视频播放。
zh.hero.subtitle: 北京邮电大学推理实验室
zh.hero.description:
专注于领域知识推理与多模态大语言模型研究
致力于推动大模型在金融、医疗、科研诚信、AI4Science等垂直领域的应用与发展
zh.finance.title: 金融推理研究
zh.finance.subtitle: 我们在金融推理领域的最新研究成果
zh.finance.financeReasoning.description: 一个新颖的基准测试，用于评估大型推理模型（LRMs）在金融数值推理问题中的推理能力，具有增强的严谨性和开源函数库。
zh.finance.finMMR.description: 一个新颖的双语多模态基准测试，涵盖14个子领域和多样化的图表类型，旨在推进MLLMs在真实世界金融推理场景中的能力。
zh.finance.finMMDocR.description: 一个新颖的双语多模态基准测试，用于评估MLLMs在金融数值推理中的表现，具有场景感知、文档理解和多步计算的特点。
zh.knowledge.title: 知识推理研究
zh.knowledge.subtitle: 我们在知识推理与图推理领域的最新研究成果
zh.knowledge.kbqa.description: 一种新颖的代理式知识库问答方法，利用蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）进行逻辑形式生成和知识库环境探索。在有限标注数据的情况下，将Llama-3.1-8B模型的GrailQA F1性能提升至78.5%。
zh.knowledge.hyperGraphRAG.description: 基于超图的检索增强生成方法，通过超图结构建模复杂的关系网络，提升RAG系统在知识检索和生成任务中的性能，特别适用于需要处理多层次、多关系知识场景的应用。
zh.knowledge.graphR1.description: 一个通过端到端强化学习实现的代理型GraphRAG框架。该框架引入了轻量级的知识超图构建，将检索建模为多轮的代理-环境交互，并通过端到端的奖励机制优化代理过程。在推理准确性、检索效率和生成质量方面优于传统的GraphRAG方法。

en.featured.label: Featured Product
en.featured.title: Insighta Research Integrity Platform
en.featured.subtitle: AI-powered research integrity review infrastructure
en.featured.description: Detect image reuse, AIGC-generated figures, and build explainable evidence chains for academic review.
en.featured.videoFallback: Your browser does not support the video tag.
en.hero.subtitle: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications Reasoning Lab
en.hero.description:
Focusing on domain knowledge reasoning and multimodal large language models
Advancing large-model applications in finance, healthcare, research integrity, AI4Science, and other vertical domains
en.finance.title: Financial Reasoning
en.finance.subtitle: Our latest research achievements in financial reasoning
en.finance.financeReasoning.description: A novel benchmark for evaluating the reasoning capabilities of large reasoning models (LRMs) on financial numerical reasoning problems, with enhanced rigor and an open-source function library.
en.finance.finMMR.description: A novel bilingual multimodal benchmark covering 14 subdomains and diverse chart types, designed to advance MLLMs in real-world financial reasoning scenarios.
en.finance.finMMDocR.description: A novel bilingual multimodal benchmark for evaluating MLLMs in financial numerical reasoning, featuring scenario awareness, document understanding, and multi-step computation.
en.knowledge.title: Knowledge Reasoning
en.knowledge.subtitle: Our latest research achievements in knowledge reasoning and graph reasoning
en.knowledge.kbqa.description: A novel agentic knowledge base question answering method that uses Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) for logical-form generation and knowledge-base environment exploration. With limited labeled data, it improves the GrailQA F1 performance of Llama-3.1-8B to 78.5%.
en.knowledge.hyperGraphRAG.description: A hypergraph-based retrieval-augmented generation method that models complex relational networks with hypergraph structures, improving RAG performance in knowledge retrieval and generation tasks, especially for multi-level and multi-relation knowledge scenarios.
en.knowledge.graphR1.description: An agentic GraphRAG framework implemented through end-to-end reinforcement learning. It introduces lightweight knowledge hypergraph construction, models retrieval as multi-turn agent-environment interaction, and optimizes the agent process through end-to-end rewards, outperforming traditional GraphRAG methods in reasoning accuracy, retrieval efficiency, and generation quality.

en.team.ehaihong.bio: Professor at the School of Computer Science (National Pilot Software Engineering School), Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications, focusing on big data, artificial intelligence, and reasoning technologies.
en.team.zichentang.name: Zichen Tang
en.team.zichentang.bio: Focusing on domain knowledge reasoning and multimodal large language models, with 7 top-tier conference papers and 220+ Google Scholar citations.
